status: PLACEHOLDER - to be filled during a live browser run
note: Static analysis only. Populate 'requests' by driving each view against a live backend.

api_base_resolution.injected: window.COLLABFORGE_BACKEND_URL when config.js __BACKEND_URL__ is replaced at deploy

static_expectations: Every request targets BASE + /api/v1/*. No cross-origin third-party API calls from the browser (Anakin/OpenAI/ElevenLabs are all server-side).
On network failure api-client returns {success:false,error:{code:NETWORK}} and the UI shows a retry-able error state - no uncaught rejections.
